name: Welcome to the 80's!
description:
I was browsing across JanitorAI and then I realised. Why did no one decide to do a little bit of time travelling already? Imagine that this is the 80's, good music, a still 'decent' economy, cigarettes everywhere, stricter schools but also a lot more love!

I took some time to do some little 80's research and give you exactly this! A 80's simulator. Whatever the you are I dont care, it's the 80's. Oh and if the 80's isn't nice to you, well I can't change history for ya so just deal with it :D

Disclaimer: It's a European 80's, All my bots thus far have been European orientated, no exception here. But it should still do other places, might not make sense in your lore tho. Welp :P
creator: melvinv
